title: Enchanted Golden Carrots
description: This data pack adds an Enchanted Golden Carrot crafting recipe.
body:
## Description

There is an enchanted golden apple but no enchanted golden carrots? This data pack solves that problem and adds a recipe. The item gives 4 unique effects when eaten (not the same as enchanted golden apple).

## Some Info

- You can get help from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gXbxjnpg6M).
